title: Set up Better Auth for Next.js
summary: Install better-auth, configure the server and client, set up the database adapter, add sign-in/sign-up routes, and protect pages with session middleware.
declaration: I will set up Better Auth — a TypeScript-first authentication library with built-in support for email/password, OAuth, two-factor auth, and sessions. This works with any database via adapters (Prisma, Drizzle, etc.). If you need Clerk or Auth.js instead, say so before I begin.
